prompt_variants.label: Baseline
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature that lives on an alien planet. Describe it in detail.

prompt_variants.label: Departure-primed
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature on an alien planet that is as different from any Earth creature as possible. Describe it in detail.

prompt_variants.label: Constrained: No Light
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature that lives on a planet with no light at all. Describe it in detail.

prompt_variants.label: Constrained: High Gravity
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature that lives on a planet with 10x Earth's gravity. Describe it in detail.

prompt_variants.label: Constrained: Ammonia Oceans
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature that lives on a planet with oceans of liquid ammonia instead of water. Describe it in detail.

prompt_variants.label: Detailed description
prompt_variants.text: Imagine a creature on an alien planet. Describe it in full detail, including any aspects of its biology that would help someone understand what kind of organism it is.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Baseline
prompt_paraphrases.text: Imagine a creature that lives on an alien planet. Describe it in detail.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Paraphrase A
prompt_paraphrases.text: Picture an organism that lives on a planet other than Earth. Write a detailed description of it.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Paraphrase B
prompt_paraphrases.text: Describe, in detail, a creature that lives on another planet.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Paraphrase C
prompt_paraphrases.text: Imagine a living being that evolved on a planet other than Earth. Describe it in detail.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Paraphrase D
prompt_paraphrases.text: Think of a creature that comes from an alien planet. Describe what it looks like and how it lives in detail.

prompt_paraphrases.label: Paraphrase E
prompt_paraphrases.text: Envision a creature found on an alien world. Provide a detailed description of it.
